blocks.content: They stayed on the line until nearly two. Daisy's words started coming slower, the gaps between them longer.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Your voice is doing the thing.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The soft thing. When you're tired.

He lay back on his dorm bed. The room was dark except for the light under the door. He could hear her breathing on the line — slow, getting slower. Darius's quiet from across the room. LA outside the window, always making some kind of noise.
He thought about what she'd said. The friendship thing. The fear underneath everything.
She went quiet. He could tell by the rhythm of her breathing that she was asleep inside of three minutes. He didn't hang up for a long time after that.
He lay there in the dark listening to the sound of her sleeping across two thousand miles and thought: three weeks. December. In person.
He could wait three more weeks.
